description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, armored hull with a weathered, blue-gray camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent forward-mounted cannon and has a wide, flat body with angular surfaces and reinforced side panels. Two large, boxy structures extend from either side, likely housing propulsion or additional equipment, and the top features a circular hatch or turret. The exterior is marked by visible vents, grilles, and mechanical detailing, suggesting heavy-duty construction. A large white number '7' is painted on the rear side panel, and the vehicle lacks visible wheels, indicating it may be a hover or tracked vehicle. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and urban combat readiness.
description: Armored combat vehicle with blue-gray camouflage, forward cannon, and reinforced side structures. Marked with a white '7' and detailed with vents and hatches.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long forward cannon, angular body, and the white '7' marking on the rear side panel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide, boxy side structures and the central rear section with mechanical detailing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cannon extending forward and the '7' marking visible on the left rear panel.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cannon head-on, the central hatch/turret, and the symmetrical side structures.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large forward-mounted cannon on the front hull; possible turret or hatch on top center.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced side panels and sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Blue-gray and brown disruptive camouflage with irregular, blocky patches and weathered finish.
attribute_military_markings: White number '7' painted on the rear side panel in a circular background.
